modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Multiple Keychain password prompts on macOS.

full_description_text: User reports receiving 8-10 Keychain password requests. This occurs when accessing the computer. Keychain messages appear repeatedly.
short_description: Multiple Keychain password prompts on macOS.
description: User reports receiving 8-10 Keychain password requests. This occurs when accessing the computer. Keychain messages appear repeatedly.
